description_long: This is a dome-shaped helmet with a wide, slightly flared brim and a smooth, matte surface in a light grayish-tan color. A metallic brown band encircles the helmet just above the brim, adding structural detail and visual contrast. At the front center of the band, there is a prominent circular metallic fixture with a blue gem or lens embedded in its center, suggesting a functional or decorative element. The helmet appears to be made primarily of metal, with the band and fixture likely being of a different, possibly more robust metal. A thin strap or cord is visible, likely serving as a chin strap for securing the helmet on the wearer's head. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and no visible branding or graphic patterns.
description: A dome-shaped, light grayish-tan helmet with a metallic brown band and a blue-centered fixture at the front. It features a smooth surface and a thin chin strap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue-centered metallic fixture and the full width of the brown band.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the protruding metallic fixture and the continuous band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted dome and band, with the chin strap visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the metallic fixture and the helmet's curvature.
